command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
-- Check projects columns relevant to contacts join
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'projects' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('id','title','name','projectId')
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;

-- Check contacts columns relevant to projects join
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'contacts' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('projectId','project','project_id','reportId')
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;

-- Check contactProjects table
DESCRIBE contactProjects;

rows.COLUMN_NAME: Field	Type	Null	Key	Default	Extra
id	int	NO	PRI	NULL	auto_increment
